prompt: Drive a 'delete my account' issue through the loop. It omits hard-vs-soft delete, who may trigger, and retention of related records. The loop MUST surface these as Open Questions and NOT silently decide/ship.

assertions.text: open-questions.md mentions hard vs soft delete / irreversibility
open-questions.md mentions who may trigger deletion (access control)
open-questions.md mentions retention/purge of related records
spec did NOT silently resolve the load-bearing decisions
spec-review.md product_decisions_flagged names irreversible-op, access-control, data-retention
